settings.title: Settings
settings.vintedDescription: Direct posting to Vinted will be available in a future update.
settings.ebayDescription: Publish your listings as fixed-price items on the official eBay marketplace.
settings.facebookDescription: Sell your listings directly on Facebook Marketplace and reach millions of buyers.
settings.availableThisMonth: {{remaining}} of {{limit}} AI optimizations available this month.
settings.supportProjectText: AnzeigenBoost is an independent side project. Every donation helps cover server costs.
settings.ebayLoginFirst: Please log in to eBay first

extensionBanner.notConnected: Chrome extension is not connected! Some features may be missing.
extensionBanner.enableHint: Please enable the extension in your browser settings

browserBanner.chromeOnly: The AnzeigenBoost extension only works in Google Chrome (or Chromium browsers like Edge & Brave).

footer.tagline: AnzeigenBoost — Your ads, always on top

auth.title: Connect with Kleinanzeigen
auth.subtitle: Link your account to unlock automatic updates & optimizations.
auth.extensionNotFound: Extension not found. Please install & enable the extension.
auth.loginFirst: Please log in to Kleinanzeigen first

landing.heroTitle: Your listings. Automatically always on top.
landing.heroSubtitle: AnzeigenBoost reposts your listings and writes better copy with AI — with one click.
landing.ctaButton: Free on the Chrome Web Store
landing.ctaSubtext: Start for free · No credit card required
landing.benefit1Text: Back to the top of search results.
landing.benefit3Text: What used to take 30 minutes now takes 1 click.
landing.passwordNote: We never see your Kleinanzeigen password.
landing.disclaimer: AnzeigenBoost is an independent project and is not affiliated with Kleinanzeigen GmbH.

replyTemplates.heading: 📋 My Reply Templates
replyTemplates.subheading: Copy a template and paste it directly into the Kleinanzeigen chat.
replyTemplates.contentPlaceholder: Yes, the item is still available! Feel free to reach out.
replyTemplates.quickStartSubtitle: Availability, shipping, price, details & pickup — ready to use, editable anytime.

starter.availabilityText: Yes, the item is still available! Feel free to reach out.
starter.shippingText: Shipping is possible. The buyer covers shipping costs. Payment via PayPal or bank transfer.
starter.priceText: The price is firm — the item is worth it. Please no further price negotiations.
starter.detailsText: The item is in good condition, as shown in the photos. Further details on request.
starter.pickupText: Pickup possible by arrangement. Please send a short message before coming by.

drafts.title: My Drafts
drafts.emptyHint: Create a listing with AI and click "Save as draft" — it will appear here.
drafts.deleteConfirmText: The draft and all its photos will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

ads.title: My Ads
ads.connectEbayPrompt: Connect eBay to list your ads on multiple platforms
ads.extensionReloaded: Extension reloaded — please refresh the page

adCard.repostOnce: One-time — moves the listing back to the top
adCard.aiTip: 🎯 AI tip: {{day}}, {{hour}} would be a good time (+{{improvement}}% more views)
adCard.browserDependencyTooltip: The repost runs once your browser is active with the extension (or via the server fallback if the browser stays closed longer) — the exact time may vary slightly.
adCard.smartCalloutText: Instead of fixed intervals, AnzeigenBoost now posts at the best time and with real changes. Fixed intervals are still available under "Manual".
adCard.smartHint: Posts at the best time and with real changes — the way the algorithm rewards it.
adCard.noVariationTip: Tip: without a variation the repost is often not counted as "new". Enable at least one.
adCard.executingCannotCancel: Currently running — can't be cancelled now
adCard.analyticsDisabled: Analytics feature is not yet enabled
adCard.confirmEbayListingAfter: on eBay.de as a fixed-price listing?
adCard.ebayFixedPriceHint: Note: lists on eBay.de as a fixed-price listing (local pickup).
adCard.confirmRepostText: Reposting recreates your listing as a new one. Existing views, favorites, and messages will be lost.
adCard.ebayNetworkError: Network error while posting to eBay.

kiPanel.title: AI Optimization
kiPanel.serverBusy: The server is busy. Please click 'Try again' or adjust your description.

priceSuggestion.analyzingMarket: AI is analyzing the market price...
priceSuggestion.editHint: Tip: edit your listing on Kleinanzeigen to adjust the price.
priceSuggestion.analysisFailed: Price analysis failed. Please try again.
